name: oscar-document-checks-mcp
description: Computational document-structure + formatting checks MCP for Oscar GC's Lavern partners. Adapter lift of Lavern's document-checks.ts (Apache-2.0; commit 7c2efe61). Two tools: check_document_structure (heading hierarchy + numbering + cross-refs) + check_document_formatting (defined-term consistency, numbering schemes, typography). Debate-board writes (record_pass_result, compile_verification_report) are dropped — verification-pass sub-recipe handles compilation in its response.
author: s-arturko
